name: Gouki Bearhug
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハッグベア
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gouki" card, or Normal Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes half its original ATK until the end of this turn. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 "Gouki" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Gouki Bearhug". You can only use each effect of "Gouki Bearhug" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gouki" card, or Normal Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes half its original ATK until the end of this turn.
